studies.title:
Implementation of a digital nurse to improve the use of digital health applications for older people with depressive disorders (DiGA4Aged) -
A randomized proof of concept study.

_verification.reason: The study does not mention 'Selfapys Online-Kurs bei Binge-Eating-Störung,' its company 'Störung Selfapy GmbH,' or provide any specific description matching the product. The study appears to focus on a digital nurse for older people with depressive disorders, which is unrelated to the described DTx for binge eating disorder.
